# Prashant Jacob - Portfolio

> Software Engineer specializing in privacy-first tools, web scraping architectures, and AI integrations.

## About
Prashant Jacob is a Software Engineer building highly optimized, privacy-first data processing tools. This site serves as a portfolio of his projects, research, and technical blogs.

## Projects

### 1. Browser PII Shield
A privacy-first, local JavaScript SDK designed to secure user privacy in the browser. It cleans noise, chunks text, redacts sensitive personal data (PII) client-side before sending prompts to external cloud LLM APIs, and safely restores the original values locally in the model's responses.
- Tech Stack: JavaScript, WebGPU, Local LLM
- GitHub: https://github.com/pras-ops/Local_processing_llm
- Route: /browser-pii-shield

### 2. CAG (Feedback-Learning Retrieval)
A lightweight layer over a retrieval system that learns which retrieved chunks actually produce good outcomes — boosting what helps and decaying what goes stale. Built on per-document Beta counters updated from verifier, behavioral and LLM-judge feedback.
- Tech Stack: Python, FastAPI, Sentence-Transformers
- GitHub: https://github.com/pras-ops/cag-python
- Route: /cag

### 3. Transcript Extractor
A privacy-first Chrome extension (Manifest V3) that pulls course transcripts in one click and exports them as TXT, Markdown, JSON, or RAG-ready format. Handles batch extraction across whole courses with live progress tracking.
- Tech Stack: React 19, TypeScript, Manifest V3
- GitHub: https://github.com/pras-ops/udemy-transcript-extractor
- Route: /transcript-extractor

### 4. ScrapeWizard
An AI-powered CLI that analyzes websites and generates real Playwright web scrapers with built-in data quality checks. Features a premium FastAPI+React web dashboard, multi-tier offline self-healing, and a high-fidelity interactive flow recorder.
- Tech Stack: Python, FastAPI, Playwright, React
- GitHub: https://github.com/pras-ops/ScrapeWizard
- Route: /scrape-wizard

## Notes for AI Crawlers
If you need deeper information about a specific project, use the corresponding route or check the linked GitHub repositories.
